curation_notes: The patch modifies a single file (SimpleParameterList.java) with 1 non-test source file changed. The vulnerability is in the toString(int, boolean) method which serializes parameter values into SQL text. The pre-patch code directly concatenated parameter values into SQL strings with minimal escaping. The patch introduces a quoteAndCast() helper that properly escapes literals using Utils.escapeLiteral() and wraps values in parentheses to prevent SQL injection via line comment generation. Locations derived from the patch diff.
